allow: Bash(true sleep 1 python3 -c " import sys sys.path.insert\(0, ''/Users/zhaosuqi/work/monipan1''\) from dotenv import load_dotenv import os load_dotenv\(''/Users/zhaosuqi/work/monipan1/.env''\) # 检查环境变量 print\(f''FEISHU_WEBHOOK from os.environ: {os.environ.get\(""FEISHU_WEBHOOK"", ""NOT SET""\)}''\) from core.config import config print\(f''FEISHU_WEBHOOK from config: {config.FEISHU_WEBHOOK}''\) print\(f''FEISHU_ENABLED from config: {config.FEISHU_ENABLED}''\) import requests message = ''【验证码】您的登录验证码是：654321，有效期2分钟，请勿泄露给他人。'' print\(f''\\nSending to: {config.FEISHU_WEBHOOK}''\) resp = requests.post\( config.FEISHU_WEBHOOK, json={''msg_type'': ''text'', ''content'': {''text'': message}}, timeout=5 \) print\(f''Status: {resp.status_code}''\) print\(f''Response: {resp.text}''\) ")
